title: Intricately Smoky Saudi Arabian Natto Skewers
description: A light and smoky Saudi Arabian dish featuring natto, binchotan-charcoal, and low-sodium ingredients, perfect for a unique snack or appetizer. This dish is cooked to perfection on a raclette-grill.
instructions: Preheat the raclette-grill to medium-high heat.
Thread natto onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush the natto with olive oil and season with cumin, coriander, and salt-free seasoning.
Place the skewers on the raclette-grill and cook for 5 minutes per side.
Meanwhile, ignite the binchotan charcoal and place it near the skewers to infuse a smoky flavor.
In a small bowl, mix together lemon juice, garlic, and ginger.
Brush the lemon juice mixture onto the natto during the last minute of cooking.
Remove the skewers from the grill and serve immediately.
Garnish with fresh herbs, if desired.
